socialTrends.name: SpaceX
socialTrends.summary: Intense focus on its post-IPO price action. Bears are pointing out its high price-to-sales multiple, while a massive 31% short interest float has retail traders planning a squeeze before Nasdaq-100 index inclusion.

socialTrends.name: Tesla Inc
socialTrends.summary: Massive delivery report of 480k units is heavily discussed. Bears target price cuts and BYD's volumes, while bulls highlight first YoY growth in two years and progress of FSD approvals in Europe.

socialTrends.name: SoFi Technologies
socialTrends.summary: Retail discussion centers around SOFI reclaiming key technical Fibonacci supports and fintech expansion. Traders are aiming for multi-year targets up to $45 on banking license growth and deposit momentum.

socialTrends.name: Moderna Inc
socialTrends.summary: An extraordinary 75% run over the past 30 days is the talk of retail boards. A unanimous 9-0 FDA advisory committee backing of its seasonal flu vaccine mFlusiva is cheered as a major de-risker of its mRNA platform.

socialTrends.name: Palantir Technologies
socialTrends.summary: Rallying over 21% from June lows. Users are celebrating DA Davidson's upgrade to Buy and price target hike to $175, discussing how Palantir's ontology serves as a best-of-breed model orchestrator in enterprise-ator in the AI boom.
